senses.gloss: to represent, to mean, to signify, to stand for
to present oneself, to stand, to appear
to come forth, to come forward, to enter, to appear
to portray, to play, to present
to represent, to stand for, to be exemplary for, to account for

examples.text: يهاجر هو وأتباعه من مكة إلى المدينة المنورة (المعروفة آنذاك باسم يثرب) في وقت لاحق من عام 622 ويُمَثِّلُ هذا الحدث٬ الهجرة٬ بداية التقويم الإسلامي.
examples.english: He and his followers migrated from Mecca to Medina (then known as Yathrib) later in 622 AD. This event, the Hijra, marks the beginning of the Islamic calendar.

senses.gloss: to make to resemble, to make to look like
to make similar, to make analogous
to punish severely, to treat harshly

etymology.text:
Compare Hebrew מָשָׁל (mašál, “example”).

Cognate with Hebrew מָשָׁל (mashál, “proverb, allegory”).
